race.comment: Sticking with IMMEDIACY (4) third up from a spell. His return in he G3 Carlyon Cup was excellent off a very fast tempo, perhaps just a bit flat last time at Caulfield with the big weight. He drops 3.5kg off that, gets Jamie Mott on and can run a huge race at each way odds. MAGNASPIN (3) beat IMMEDIACY at Caulfield to continue his strong form. He's worse off at the weights now and away from his favourite track but will give a huge sight again. WHISKY ON THE HILL (2) comes here straight from the Carlyon where he ran very well at big odds. This trip will suit much better now. Very wary of the import AUGUSTUS (1) who kicks off for Ciaron Maher. He's a talented German horse who has been well supported in early betting for strong connections. SAGANTI (7) ran well behind MAGNASPIN last time and has each way claims again.
